code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_line()
  let s = match line
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    ""
  end
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut total = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut stop = false
  let n = parts.len()
  while i < n and not stop
    let tok = match parts.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if v < 0
      stop = true
    else
      total = total + v
      i = i + 1
    end
  end
  println("partial=#{total}")
end
